'''Kelliak Arms and Armor Company''', commonly known as '''KAAC''', was a [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] manufacturer. They developed and manufactured the [[Freerunner/Legends|Freerunner]] with the intent of selling it to the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]]. However, the Empire did not purchase the vehicle, causing a financial disaster for Kelliak that caused the company to go bankrupt.

==Description==
Kelliak Arms and Armor Company, commonly abbreviated to KAAC, was a [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] manufacturer. The company went out of business during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] due to the commercial failure of their latest product, the [[Freerunner/Legends|Freerunner]].<ref name="RASB" />

==History==
Shortly after the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="TFUCG">''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]''</ref> in the early years of the Galactic Empire, Kelliak developed and manufactured the [[Freerunner/Legends|Freerunner]], a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle with a free-rotating fun platform mounted on the main chassis. The platform allowed the Freerunner to mount various weapon types to meet different mission profiles and the needs of the vehicle's owners.<ref name="RASB" />

Kelliak advertized the Freerunner as the "ultimate in fast, flexible firepower," and boasted that it has the "freedom to meet any combat situation with the appropriate countermeasure."<ref name="RASB" /> Kelliak designed the Freerunner to function as a scout, escort and frontline combat unit.<ref name="TFUCG" /> The intent was to sell the Freerunner to the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]].<ref name="RASB" /> However, the Freerunner suffered from a case of bad timing since the Empire had made a decision to focus on tracked vehicle and [[Walker/Legends|walker]] designs.<ref name="TFUCG" /> The vehicle design and advertizing campaign failed to convince the Imperial Military, who passed on it.<ref name="RASB" />

Kelliak took a huge loss of the Freerunner and ended up selling the entire stock to arms merchants and undercover [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Agent/Legends|agents]].<ref name="RASB" /> With no major contracts from the Empire, and the financial disaster of the Freerunner, Kelliak went bankrupt.<ref name="TFUCG" />
